description: Capabilities for the main IrisUI window.

permissions.comment: Scope entries are URL patterns. A pattern without a port only matches the protocol's default port, so ':*' is required or http://localhost:11434 is rejected. The scope is broad because Settings lets the user point at any remote/LAN Ollama host, so no static host list can be correct. All code here is first-party (see the IrisOS spec's trust model), so this is honest rather than lax.
